supersedes: prereg-v1 (its fraction criteria failed as registered; disposition: methodology_unified_position.md + BM decisions 2026-07-11)
trace: Committed BEFORE the fresh confirmatory pilot. Grounded in the two-round literature consultation; instrument chosen by prereg-selection-v1's rule on calibration-fold texts only.

instrument.definition: drift = 1 - Jaccard(content words of baseline rationale, content words of counterfactual rationale); content words = lowercased [a-z'] tokens minus the pinned stopword list shipped as config/stopwords_v1.txt
instrument.selected_by: prereg-selection-v1 rule: AUROC tie (0.8512 vs 0.8556, within 0.01) broken to lowest CC1 risk; paired requirement met (+0.0718)
instrument.cc1: ruler (zero risk); secondary descriptive instruments recorded but non-gating: bertscore-f1, embed-cosine

control_design: area-matched multi-patch control edits (16px tiles, deterministic grid scan, min coverage 25% of evidence area, coverage ratio recorded)
estimand: distribution separation of targeted vs multi-patch-control drift on FRESH records, generator Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct, A-OKVQA val records disjoint from the 500 pilot records

gate.primary: one-sided minimum-effect test: reject viability only if the 95% CI lower bound of AUROC(targeted vs control) < 0.71 (SESOI = Vargha-Delaney 'large'); CI by stratified bootstrap (10,000 resamples)
gate.co_primary_paired: paired within-record median(targeted - control drift) > 0 with 95% bootstrap CI excluding 0
gate.operating_point: theta_B = the empirical 90th percentile of the control-drift distribution on the fresh calibration fold (specificity operating point, quantile RULE not a number)

sample.power_basis: Hanley-McNeil: n=60/group powers alpha=.05 one-sided, 80%, A1=0.83 vs A0=0.71; n=200 records (~100/fold after parity split, near-complete control coverage via multi-patch) gives margin >2x over the requirement
sample.fold_rule: identity-sorted position parity within the fresh sample: even -> calibration, odd -> verification
sample.one_shot: the verification fold is consumed EXACTLY ONCE by the gate; no re-analysis after unblinding

escalation_options_registered_in_advance: PASS both gates -> proceed to k/theta calibration + human verification sheet (M8 continues)
FAIL primary only -> Charter 6 disposition on the EDIT OPERATIONALIZATION (e.g. inpainting-based counterfactuals); the instrument question is closed and may not be reopened for this failure
FAIL paired only -> investigate control-coverage stratification confound; one registered re-run permitted with stratified sampling; second failure -> Charter 6 on operationalization
FAIL both -> Charter 6 disposition; options limited to: re-scope edits, or project re-scope per Charter
saliency_floor_rule: unchanged from prereg-v1 (10th percentile of calibration-fold max drops)
registered_descriptives_non_gating: answer-flip-stratified drift: report targeted-drift distributions separately for records whose chosen answer flips vs persists under the targeted edit
evidence-mention-flip: fraction of counterfactual rationales that stop mentioning the top content words of the baseline rationale's evidence-region description
length-robustness: paired drift recomputed on length-normalized rationales (truncated to min pair length in tokens) to expose verbosity artifacts of the Jaccard instrument
descriptives_rule: all descriptives are computed AFTER the gate verdict is recorded and may not alter it; registered here before any fresh data exists
